debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
⊢ U ∼ V ↔ ∃ f g, f ∘ g = id ∧ g ∘ f = id

proof:
by
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨f, hf_inj, hf_onto⟩
    use f, fun y => Classical.choose (hf_onto y)
    constructor
    · apply funext; intro y; exact Classical.choose_spec (hf_onto y)
    · apply funext; intro x; apply hf_inj; exact Classical.choose_spec (hf_onto (f x))
  · rintro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    use f
    constructor
    · intro x1 x2 h; have h1 := congr_arg g h
      have h2 : (g ∘ f) x1 = (g ∘ f) x2 := h1
      rw [hgf] at h2; exact h2
    · intro y; use g y; exact congr_fun hfg y
successful_attempts:
by
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨f, hf_inj, hf_onto⟩
    use f, fun y => Classical.choose (hf_onto y)
    constructor
    · apply funext; intro y; exact Classical.choose_spec (hf_onto y)
    · apply funext; intro x; apply hf_inj; exact Classical.choose_spec (hf_onto (f x))
  · rintro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    use f
    constructor
    · intro x1 x2 h; have h1 := congr_arg g h
      have h2 : (g ∘ f) x1 = (g ∘ f) x2 := h1
      rw [hgf] at h2; exact h2
    · intro y; use g y; exact congr_fun hfg y
